title: Nonlinear-vs-linear probe comparison
description: Output of scripts/nonlinear_probe.py (and the multilayer variant). One JSON per model. Compares 2-layer MLP probe to a linear head at the peak layer.

peak_layer.description: Probe layer index sourced from the model's main run.

ex_dim.description: Tokens-per-feature-dim ratio for the probe fit.

seeds.description: Probe-training seeds used in the comparison.

fixed_hp.description: Fixed-hyperparameter probe results. per_seed is an array of per-seed records; the exact field set inside each record varies by run (linear, mlp_64, mlp_128, delta_64, ...).

swept_hp.description: Hyperparameter-swept probe results. per_seed is an array of per-seed records (linear, best_mlp, best_config, delta, ...).

swept_hp_holdout.description: Held-out MLP-probe partial Spearman; appears in newer runs only.

protocol.description: Probe protocol parameters (architecture variants, training schedule, hyperparameter sweep grid).

conclusion.description: Free-form summary of the linear-vs-nonlinear comparison.

provenance.description: Run-level reproducibility metadata: model SHA, generating script, timestamp, device.
